landing.hero_subtitle: OrgMatrix helps you map roles, assign people, plan succession, and identify risks — all in one powerful platform.
landing.feature1_desc: Interactive, hierarchical org charts that update in real-time as you build your team structure.
landing.feature2_desc: Full CRUD for roles and persons with departments, criticality levels, and assignment tracking.
landing.feature3_desc: Identify critical roles, assign backups, and track readiness to ensure organizational continuity.
landing.feature4_desc: Color-coded indicators highlight roles without backups and critical knowledge gaps.
landing.feature5_desc: Full support for English and German with easy language switching.
landing.feature6_desc: Simulate vacancies and analyze impact across your organization before decisions are made.
landing.phase1_desc: Organization setup, role & people management, org chart visualization.
landing.phase2_desc: Succession planning, readiness scoring, risk indicators.
landing.phase3_desc: Vacancy simulation, impact analysis, executive dashboards.
landing.phase4_desc: AI-powered suggestions, pattern detection, org health scoring.
landing.phase5_desc: RBAC, audit logs, multi-org support, HR system APIs.
landing.footer_tagline: Built by Allocore — organizational intelligence for modern leaders.
